title: Shrine of Yun-Harla
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Shrine of [[Yun-Harla]]''' was a shrine the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] built on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after they had Vongformed the planet into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. Dedicated to the Goddess of Deception, a vast pit of water was located before the Shrine, filled with [[p'hiili]] and [[ngom]], creatures once native to the original Yuuzhan'tar. A statue of [[Yun-Yuuzhan]], the Creator God of the Yuuzhan Vong, was also located in the Shrine; the statue was made of the bones of natives of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

[[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] [[Harrar]] met [[Master Shaper]] [[Nen Yim]] at the Shrine, where they made their plans to travel to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. The Shrine was destroyed during their flight, when a [[Tsik-Seru]] crashed into it.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
